allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys,base64 d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) hdrs={h['name']:h['value'] for h in d.get\('payload',{}\).get\('headers',[]\)} print\('From:', hdrs.get\('From',''\)\) print\('To:', hdrs.get\('To',''\)\) print\('Cc:', hdrs.get\('Cc',''\)\) print\('Subject:', hdrs.get\('Subject',''\)\) def get_text\(part\): if part.get\('mimeType'\) == 'text/plain': data = part.get\('body',{}\).get\('data',''\) if data: return base64.urlsafe_b64decode\(data + '=='\).decode\('utf-8','ignore'\) for p in part.get\('parts',[]\): r = get_text\(p\) if r: return r return '' body = get_text\(d.get\('payload',{}\)\) print\(body[:2000]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys,base64 d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) hdrs={h['name']:h['value'] for h in d.get\('payload',{}\).get\('headers',[]\)} print\('From:', hdrs.get\('From',''\)\) print\('To:', hdrs.get\('To',''\)\) print\('Cc:', hdrs.get\('Cc',''\)\) def get_text\(part\): if part.get\('mimeType'\) == 'text/plain': data = part.get\('body',{}\).get\('data',''\) if data: return base64.urlsafe_b64decode\(data + '=='\).decode\('utf-8','ignore'\) for p in part.get\('parts',[]\): r = get_text\(p\) if r: return r return '' body = get_text\(d.get\('payload',{}\)\) print\(body[:1500]\) ")
